title: Leadership Style Assessment (What Type of Boss Are You?)
description: Оцените ваш стиль руководства по трём измерениям: Открытость к новому, Добросовестность, Доброжелательность.

questions.text: I like to discuss complex ideas with my team | I like to discuss details with my team

answers.text: I like to discuss complex ideas with my team
I like to discuss details with my team

questions.text: I follow established procedures | I try new ways of doing things

answers.text: I follow established procedures
I try new ways of doing things

questions.text: I like to use trusted methods | I like to try to innovate

answers.text: I like to use trusted methods
I like to try to innovate

questions.text: I like learning practical skills | I like learning about ideas and theories

answers.text: I like learning practical skills
I like learning about ideas and theories

questions.text: I like a workplace that’s full of surprises | I like a workplace where things go according to plan

answers.text: I like a workplace that’s full of surprises
I like a workplace where things go according to plan

questions.text: I prefer to work according to a schedule | I prefer to work on whatever needs to be done

answers.text: I prefer to work according to a schedule
I prefer to work on whatever needs to be done

questions.text: I am good at working steadily according to the plan | I am good at adapting to last-minute changes

answers.text: I am good at working steadily according to the plan
I am good at adapting to last-minute changes

questions.text: I like to be notified of projects well in advance | I like to adapt quickly to changing demands

answers.text: I like to be notified of projects well in advance
I like to adapt quickly to changing demands

questions.text: I choose the most rational option | I choose the kindest option

answers.text: I choose the most rational option
I choose the kindest option

questions.text: I like to cooperate | I like to compete

answers.text: I like to cooperate
I like to compete

questions.text: I trust others | I am skeptical of others

answers.text: I trust others
I am skeptical of others

questions.text: I try to get ahead at work | I try to please others at work

answers.text: I try to get ahead at work
I try to please others at work

questions.text: I would rather try something new than do things the same old way
I like to do things differently, even if I am not sure it will work
My hobbies and interests are somewhat unusual
I have a rich fantasy life
I would rather go with the flow than have a set schedule
I have trouble sticking to a routine
I like to finish all my tasks for the day before I do something fun
I like to start projects well in advance, so that I have plenty of time to finish
I am sensitive to feedback at work
I enjoy being there for my team members when they're upset
I like to help my team members with their personal problems
I go out of my way to make my team members feel at ease
I trust tried and true methods | I question tried and true methods

answers.text: I trust tried and true methods
I question tried and true methods

questions.text: I focus on real life | I use my imagination

answers.text: I focus on real life
I use my imagination

questions.text: I like to practice familiar skills | I like to constantly learn new things

answers.text: I like to practice familiar skills
I like to constantly learn new things

questions.text: I notice small details | I see the big picture

answers.text: I notice small details
I see the big picture

questions.text: I prefer working toward long-term goals | I prefer to work on tasks that must be done immediately

answers.text: I prefer working toward long-term goals
I prefer to work on tasks that must be done immediately

questions.text: I like to complete tasks well in advance of deadlines | I enjoy working under pressure

answers.text: I like to complete tasks well in advance of deadlines
I enjoy working under pressure

questions.text: I persist in my goals | I adapt to my environment

answers.text: I persist in my goals
I adapt to my environment

questions.text: I thrive in chaotic work environments | I thrive within a clear structure

answers.text: I thrive in chaotic work environments
I thrive within a clear structure

questions.text: I'm good at negotiating personal issues | I'm good at navigating logical systems

answers.text: I'm good at negotiating personal issues
I'm good at navigating logical systems

questions.text: I like solving logical problems | I like solving relational problems

answers.text: I like solving logical problems
I like solving relational problems

questions.text: I like building relationships at work | I like demonstrating my competence at work

answers.text: I like building relationships at work
I like demonstrating my competence at work

questions.text: I like to be friends with my coworkers | I prefer to be businesslike in my work relationships

answers.text: I like to be friends with my coworkers
I prefer to be businesslike in my work relationships
